skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
6x = 18

2x + y = 11

The solution to the given system of equations is (x, y). What is the value of x - y?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. From 6x = 18, x = 3. Then 6 + y = 11 gives y = 5. So x - y = -2.

Other choices result from arithmetic errors.
